capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Is there a documented enterprise risk management function or service with a clear charter and scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an ERM function exists with documented charter and scope
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented ERM charter and scope

questions.prompt: How is the ERM operating model defined—including stakeholders, cadence of activities, and how risk owners engage with the program?
questions.intent: Evaluate ERM operating model and stakeholder engagement
questions.evaluation_focus: Operating model, stakeholders, and delivery cadence

questions.prompt: How does the organization gather feedback and improve the ERM service over time?
questions.intent: Evaluate continuous improvement for the ERM function
questions.evaluation_focus: Continuous improvement and stakeholder feedback

questions.prompt: Is there a formal enterprise risk management program charter or equivalent document that defines objectives and scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal ERM program is documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented ERM program definition or charter

questions.prompt: Does the ERM program cover all major business units and functions, or only selected areas?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide scope of the ERM program
questions.evaluation_focus: Program scope across business units and functions

questions.prompt: Who leads the ERM program, and to whom do they report for risk outcomes and escalations?
questions.intent: Evaluate ERM program leadership and reporting line
questions.evaluation_focus: Program leadership, sponsorship, and reporting line

questions.prompt: Are risk appetite and tolerance statements documented and kept current?
questions.intent: Evaluate documentation of risk appetite and tolerance
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented risk appetite and tolerance statements

questions.prompt: Who approves risk appetite and tolerance, and how are they communicated to risk owners and executives?
questions.intent: Evaluate approval and communication of risk appetite
questions.evaluation_focus: Board or executive approval and communication

questions.prompt: Can you give an example where risk appetite or tolerance influenced a prioritization decision or escalation?
questions.intent: Evaluate operational use of risk appetite in decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Evidence that appetite informs prioritization and escalations

questions.prompt: Is there a standard risk taxonomy or category model used consistently across the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate existence of a standard risk taxonomy
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined risk categories and taxonomy

questions.prompt: Is there a central or federated risk register with named owners, ratings, and status for material risks?
questions.intent: Evaluate risk register maintenance and ownership
questions.evaluation_focus: Central or federated risk register with ownership

questions.prompt: How often is the risk register reviewed and updated, and what quality controls exist?
questions.intent: Evaluate risk register refresh cadence and data quality
questions.evaluation_focus: Refresh cadence and quality controls for register data

questions.prompt: Is there a documented risk assessment methodology with defined scoring scales (e.g., likelihood and impact)?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented risk assessment methodology
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented assessment methodology and scoring scales

questions.prompt: Is the assessment methodology applied consistently across business units and major risk domains?
questions.intent: Evaluate consistent application of risk assessment methods
questions.evaluation_focus: Application across key risk domains and business units

questions.prompt: How are risk assessments calibrated, peer-reviewed, or validated to ensure consistency?
questions.intent: Evaluate calibration and validation of risk assessments
questions.evaluation_focus: Calibration, peer review, or validation of assessments

questions.prompt: For material risks, are treatment decisions documented (accept, mitigate, transfer, avoid)?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented risk treatment decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented treatment decisions per material risk

questions.prompt: Do mitigation plans include owners, milestones, and target dates that are tracked to completion?
questions.intent: Evaluate mitigation planning with accountable owners
questions.evaluation_focus: Mitigation plans with owners and milestones

questions.prompt: How does the organization measure whether risk treatments reduced residual risk?
questions.intent: Evaluate tracking of treatment effectiveness
questions.evaluation_focus: Tracking of treatment effectiveness and closure

questions.prompt: What risk governance forums or committees exist, and what decisions do they own?
questions.intent: Evaluate risk governance bodies and decision scope
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined risk committees or governance forums

questions.prompt: Is there a documented RACI or equivalent for enterprise risk decisions and escalations?
questions.intent: Evaluate RACI for risk decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented RACI for risk decisions and escalations

questions.prompt: How are risk acceptances and exceptions approved and recorded?
questions.intent: Evaluate accountability for risk acceptance and exceptions
questions.evaluation_focus: Accountability for risk acceptance and exceptions

questions.prompt: What is included in the standard enterprise risk reporting pack (e.g., heat maps, top risks, KRIs)?
questions.intent: Evaluate content of enterprise risk reporting
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined risk reporting pack and audience

questions.prompt: How often is risk information reported to executive leadership and the board?
questions.intent: Evaluate executive and board risk reporting cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Executive and board reporting cadence

questions.prompt: Can you describe a recent example where risk reporting changed a prioritization, funding decision, or escalation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether risk reporting drives action
questions.evaluation_focus: Evidence that reporting influences decisions and funding

capability_questions.capability_name: Integration with Security, Compliance, and Third-Party Risk

questions.prompt: How are information security risks integrated into the enterprise risk register and reporting?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration of security risk into ERM
questions.evaluation_focus: Linkage between ERM and security risk processes

questions.prompt: How do compliance assessments, audit findings, and regulatory changes feed into enterprise risk views?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration of compliance and audit into ERM
questions.evaluation_focus: Incorporation of compliance and audit findings into risk view

questions.prompt: How is third-party or vendor risk represented in enterprise risk reporting and treatment planning?
questions.intent: Evaluate third-party risk integration with ERM
questions.evaluation_focus: Third-party and vendor risk feeding enterprise risk reporting
